title: AutoText
description: This Fabric client mod automatically sends your configured chat messages at either a fixed or random interval, and it can be toggled with a keybind. It also includes an in-game configuration screen, available through a keybind and much more.
body:
# AutoText

**AutoText** is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that helps you quickly send predefined chat messages and commands.

It is useful if you often type the same messages, server commands, or other repeated chat text. Instead of writing everything manually every time, you can save your text once and send it faster with a keybind.

---

## Features

* Save predefined text messages
* Quickly send saved text in chat
* Useful for repeated messages and commands
* Works completely client-side
* Lightweight and simple to use
* Configurable text entries
* Keybind support for quick access
* Built for Fabric

---

## Keybinds

AutoText adds keybinds that can be changed in the Minecraft controls menu.

Default keybinds:

| Keybind | Description             |
| ------- | ----------------------- |
| `R`     | Opens the AutoText menu |
| `K`     | Starts the Mod.         |

You can change the keybinds in:

`Options → Controls → Key Binds → AutoText`

If another mod already uses the same key, you can simply assign a different key.


---

## Important information

AutoText does **not** add cheats, hacks, combat assistance, movement modifications, X-ray, duplication, or any unfair gameplay advantages.

The mod only helps with sending configurable chat text. Please use it responsibly and follow the rules of the servers you play on.

Some servers may have rules about automated or repeated messages. Make sure your usage follows the server rules.

---

## Compatibility

AutoText is a client-side mod.

| Side   | Required |
| ------ | -------- |
| Client | Yes      |
| Server | No       |

The server does not need to install this mod.

---

## License

Check the project license for more information.
